message:
fix(context): address code review findings in history.go

- Remove unused defaultMaxRecords constant (dead code)
- Fix relative path fallback in defaultRotationHistoryPath: when
  os.UserHomeDir() fails, now falls back to temp directory instead
  of a relative path. This prevents history fragmentation when the
  command is run from different working directories.
